message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant halon
participant ios1
participant ios2
participant client

note over ios2: SNS operation

halon -> ios2: m0_spiel_repair_abort
destroy ios1
destroy ios2

loop [until all IOS are in [IDLE,FAILED]]
    halon -> ios2: repair status request
    halon <-- ios2: repair status reply
end

halon -> client: notify [(pool, PREVIOUS_STATE), (disk, PREVIOUS_STATE)]

@enduml
```
